# xenorchestra_pool (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a Xen Orchestra pool.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "xenorchestra_pool" "pool" {
  name_label = "Your pool"
  # Or id = "pool-uuid"
}
data "xenorchestra_sr" "local_storage" {
  name_label = "Your storage repository label"
  pool_id    = data.xenorchestra_pool.pool.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The id of the pool. Exactly one of `id` or `name_label` must be provided.
- `name_label` (String) The name label of the pool. Exactly one of `id` or `name_label` must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `cores` (Number) Number of CPU cores in the pool.
- `default_sr` (String) The default storage repository for the pool.
- `description` (String) The description of the pool.
- `master` (String) The id of the primary instance in the pool.
- `sockets` (Number) Number of CPU sockets in the pool.
- `tags` (List of String) The tags associated with the pool.
